import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
mut total = 0
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  for p in parts
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        total = total + n * 2
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
when None
  ()
end
print("result=#{total}")
